# Welcome to Example Co

We build AI-native tools that help knowledge workers focus on what matters. Our products turn scattered information into structured, searchable intelligence.

## Why Choose Us

Teams using our platform report **3x faster** knowledge retrieval and **60% fewer** repeated questions in internal channels.
